name: TimezoneShift
description: Convert a wall-clock instant from one IANA timezone to another, returning the localized result.

name: DaylightSavingsLookup
description: Report whether a given date in a named region falls inside that region's daylight saving period and the UTC offset in effect.

name: BusinessHourOverlap
description: Given two named regions and their typical workday windows, compute the overlapping wall-clock window when both are open.

name: WorldClockBoard
description: Return current local times across a list of named cities for a glanceable dashboard.

name: MeetingTimeProposer
description: Suggest up to five wall-clock meeting windows that fall within working hours in each participant's home timezone, with optional preference for mornings or afternoons.

name: RelativeTimeDescriber
description: Render a human-friendly relative phrase such as 'in two hours' or 'yesterday afternoon' from an absolute timestamp.

name: ZoneAbbreviationResolver
description: Disambiguate a colloquial timezone abbreviation such as CST to its canonical IANA identifier given a hint country.

name: ContrastRatioCalculator
description: Compute the WCAG 2.2 contrast ratio between a foreground and background hex color and report AA and AAA pass status for normal and large text sizes.

name: ComplementaryPaletteGenerator
description: Generate a five-swatch palette around a seed color using complementary, analogous, or triadic harmony rules.

name: ColorNameLookup
description: Return the closest named color from the CSS, Pantone, or RAL vocabulary for a given hex value.

name: ColorBlindSimulator
description: Render how a hex color would appear under common color-vision deficiencies including deuteranopia, protanopia, and tritanopia.

name: HexToHslConverter
description: Convert a six-digit hex color into hue, saturation, and lightness components.

name: BrandPaletteAuditor
description: Audit a candidate brand palette of three to seven colors for internal contrast coverage, accessibility under three common color-vision deficiencies, and perceived warmth or coolness, returning a structured report with per-pair findings.

name: GradientStopSuggester
description: Suggest gradient stops between two anchor colors using a chosen interpolation space such as Oklch or sRGB.

name: CurrentConditionsReporter
description: Return the present temperature, humidity, wind, and sky description for a named locality.

name: HourlyForecastReader
description: Retrieve an hour-by-hour forecast over the next 48 hours for a named locality, including precipitation probability and felt temperature.

name: ClimateNormalsLookup
description: Look up the 30-year climate normals for a named locality and return monthly averages of temperature, precipitation, and sunshine hours.

name: AirQualityAdvisoryReader
description: Report the current air quality advisory and the dominant pollutant for a named locality, mapping to a colored caution level.

name: StormWarningChecker
description: Check whether any active severe-weather advisory is in force over a named locality and return the issuing authority and expiration time.

name: HistoricalWeatherReplay
description: Return the observed weather conditions on a specific past date at a named locality, including daily high, low, precipitation total, and dominant sky description, for use in retrospective planning narratives.

name: UvExposureAdvisor
description: Report the peak ultraviolet level for the day at a named locality and recommend a sun-exposure caution level.

name: RecipeIngredientScaler
description: Scale every ingredient in a saved recipe up or down to a new serving size, preserving original ratios.

name: NutritionFactsLookup
description: Return calories, macronutrients, and major micronutrients per 100 grams of a named whole or prepared food.

name: RecipeSubstitutionAdvisor
description: Suggest acceptable substitutions for an ingredient given dietary constraints such as dairy-free, gluten-free, or nut-free, with notes on flavor and texture trade-offs.

name: MealPlanCalorieBudgeter
description: Distribute a daily calorie target across breakfast, lunch, dinner, and an optional snack, given a chosen macronutrient split.

name: CookingTemperatureGuide
description: Return the recommended internal cooking temperature for a named protein at a chosen doneness level.

name: PantryRecipeSuggester
description: Suggest recipes that can be made from a provided pantry inventory, ranked by how few additional ingredients are needed and how well they match a chosen cuisine.

name: FoodPairingFlavorWheel
description: Suggest complementary ingredients for a seed ingredient using a flavor-affinity vocabulary.

name: TrackMetadataLookup
description: Return the title, artist, album, release year, and duration for a track identified by ISRC or by artist and title pair.

name: AlbumTracklistReader
description: Read the ordered tracklist of a named album, with per-track duration and any featured-artist credits.

name: PodcastEpisodeSummarizer
description: Return the published title, host names, duration, and editorial summary of a named podcast episode.

name: GenreSimilarityExplorer
description: Suggest musical genres adjacent to a seed genre using a hand-curated affinity map, with optional restriction to currently-active scenes.

name: ArtistDiscographyTimeline
description: Return a chronological list of an artist's studio albums with release year, label, and a one-line editorial note for each entry.

name: BeatsPerMinuteEstimator
description: Estimate the tempo in beats per minute of a track from its uploaded audio fingerprint.

name: PodcastChapterMarkerExtractor
description: Return the chapter markers and their start times for a podcast episode that publishes structured chapter metadata.

name: TextLanguageDetector
description: Detect the most likely natural language of a piece of text and return an ISO 639-1 tag plus confidence.

name: PhraseTranslator
description: Translate a short phrase from a source language to a target language, with optional register hint such as formal or casual.

name: IdiomExplainer
description: Explain the literal and figurative meaning of an idiom in a named language and offer two equivalents in another language if any exist.

name: TransliterationConverter
description: Transliterate text between two writing systems for the same spoken language, for instance between Hiragana and Romaji.

name: PronunciationGuide
description: Return an IPA pronunciation and an audio waveform reference for a word in a named language and regional accent.

name: LanguageLearningFlashcardBuilder
description: Build a deck of spaced-repetition flashcards from a vocabulary list, with target language, source language, example sentences for each word, and an optional difficulty tier that tunes how many obscure entries are included.

name: CurrencyRateLookup
description: Return the spot mid-market exchange rate between two ISO 4217 currencies as of a chosen instant.

name: LengthUnitConverter
description: Convert a numeric length between any two supported units across metric, imperial, and astronomical systems.

name: MassUnitConverter
description: Convert a numeric mass between any two supported units across metric and imperial systems including troy ounces.

name: TemperatureConverter
description: Convert a temperature between Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin, and Rankine.

name: VolumeUnitConverter
description: Convert a volume between metric, US customary, and imperial cooking units while flagging where US and imperial cups differ.

name: CurrencyHistoryChart
description: Return daily closing exchange rates between two currencies across a chosen date window for charting and trend description, with optional smoothing over a moving-average window in days.

name: AnyUnitGeneralConverter
description: Attempt to convert between any two unit strings by routing through a dimensional analysis solver, returning either the result or a structured reason if the dimensions are incompatible.

name: SunriseSunsetLookup
description: Return the civil sunrise and sunset times for a given date at a chosen latitude and longitude.

name: MoonPhaseReporter
description: Report the lunar phase, illumination percentage, and angular size on a given date.

name: GoldenHourCalculator
description: Return the morning and evening golden-hour windows at a chosen location and date, useful for photography planning.

name: VisiblePlanetsTonight
description: List which classical planets are visible to the naked eye from a chosen location tonight, with rise and set times and a recommended viewing window.

name: MeteorShowerCalendar
description: Return upcoming meteor showers with peak dates, expected zenithal hourly rates, and a viewing-condition note based on the moon phase at peak.

name: ConstellationOverheadFinder
description: Return the constellations currently above a chosen horizon, with culmination times and the brightest star in each, suited to plan an evening's stargazing walk.

name: SolarEclipseLookup
description: Return solar-eclipse events visible from a chosen region within a date window, with magnitude, totality duration, and local contact times.

name: PlantWateringScheduler
description: Return a recommended watering cadence in days for a named houseplant species, adjusted for an indicated light level and pot size.

name: HardinessZoneLookup
description: Return the USDA or RHS hardiness zone for a named locality and the typical first and last frost dates.

name: CompanionPlantingAdvisor
description: Suggest companion and antagonist plants for a chosen vegetable, with a short rationale for each pairing such as pest deterrence or shade provision.

name: SeedStartIndoorCalendar
description: Generate an indoor seed-starting calendar for a list of crops based on the last expected frost date at a chosen locality, including transplant-out windows.

name: PestIdentificationTriage
description: Given a description of damage on a plant such as holes in leaves or yellow stippling, return the three most likely pests and a low-toxicity treatment option for each.

name: HouseplantLightAuditor
description: Estimate whether a chosen indoor location provides adequate light for a named houseplant species, given window orientation and distance.

name: PrunePlannerByMonth
description: Return a list of common ornamental shrubs that should be pruned in a chosen calendar month at a chosen climate zone.

name: LiveScoreboardReader
description: Return the current score, period, and clock for an ongoing match in a chosen league.

name: LeagueStandingsBoard
description: Return the current standings table for a chosen league and season including wins, losses, draws, points, and goal difference.

name: HeadToHeadHistory
description: Return the historical head-to-head record between two teams across a chosen number of past meetings, with date, venue, and score.

name: PlayerSeasonStatLine
description: Return a season stat line for a named player in a chosen league, with the per-game and totals view tailored to the sport.

name: UpcomingFixtureCalendar
description: Return a chronological list of upcoming fixtures for a chosen team across a window of weeks, with home or away, kickoff time, and broadcaster.

name: InjuryReportFeed
description: Return current injury statuses for a chosen team, with player name, body region, expected return window, and a confidence tag based on source reliability.

name: BakeryWeightConverter
description: Convert a flour, sugar, or butter measurement between cups, grams, and ounces using ingredient-specific density factors.

name: OvenTemperatureCrossWalk
description: Translate a chosen oven temperature between Celsius, Fahrenheit, and gas-mark numbers.

name: PanSizeSubstitutionGuide
description: Recommend a substitute baking pan when the called-for size is unavailable, returning a new pan plus any adjustment to baking time or temperature.

name: YieldAdjuster
description: Adjust every quantity in a list of ingredient lines to a new final yield, preserving ratios and rounding sensibly for measuring tools.

name: DailyMoodCheckIn
description: Record a one-line mood reading on a five-point valence and arousal grid for the current day.

name: JournalPromptGenerator
description: Return a single open-ended journaling prompt selected to nudge reflection on a chosen theme such as gratitude or boundaries.

name: MoodTrendChart
description: Return a chart of mood readings across the past chosen number of weeks, with weekly averages and any flagged trend changes that exceed a chosen threshold.

name: EmotionVocabularyExpander
description: Return three more precise emotion words adjacent to a coarse seed emotion such as 'angry' or 'sad', drawn from a published emotion-wheel vocabulary.

name: JournalEntryWordCount
description: Return the word count, average sentence length, and most frequent content words for a draft journal entry, for a writer who wants gentle feedback on density.

name: ReflectionPromptSeriesPlanner
description: Plan a week-long sequence of daily reflection prompts that build on each other along a chosen narrative arc such as 'closing out a project' or 'preparing for a move', returning one prompt per day with a brief framing note.

name: PetFeedingReminder
description: Schedule a recurring feeding reminder for a named pet at a chosen daily time and portion size.

name: VetAppointmentTracker
description: Record an upcoming veterinary appointment for a named pet, including clinic name, date, and reason.

name: VaccinationDueScheduler
description: Return the next due date for each routine vaccination for a named pet species and age, with a typical clinic interval.

name: DogWalkLogger
description: Log a completed dog walk with duration, distance, and a one-line note on the dog's behavior, mood, and any encounters with other animals.

name: LitterBoxCadenceTracker
description: Track when a multi-cat household's litter boxes were last scooped and emit a reminder when the cadence slips past a chosen threshold in hours.

name: PetWeightTracker
description: Record a weight reading for a named pet on the current date and return the trailing-month trend with a flag if the change exceeds a chosen percent.

name: OutfitWeatherMatcher
description: Suggest an outfit from a chosen wardrobe inventory that matches the day's forecast at a named locality, with separate top, bottom, and outerwear choices.

name: ColorCoordinationChecker
description: Check whether a candidate outfit's colors coordinate using a chosen harmony rule and flag any clashing pairs.

name: CapsuleWardrobePlanner
description: Plan a capsule wardrobe of a chosen target size across a chosen season, returning a recommended item list with quantity per category and a coverage check for typical weekly needs.

name: FabricCareLookup
description: Return the recommended laundry, drying, and ironing settings for a fabric by name, with caveats for blends.

name: ShoePairingForOccasion
description: Recommend shoes from a chosen wardrobe for a named occasion such as a wedding or a long flight.

name: WardrobeGapAnalyzer
description: Analyze a wardrobe inventory against a chosen lifestyle profile to identify the three to five items whose absence forces the most repeated outfits.

name: FlightFareWatcher
description: Watch a named city pair on chosen dates and alert when the round-trip fare drops below a target threshold.

name: ItineraryDayPlanner
description: Plan a single day in a named city with three to five activities chosen for a stated interest profile, with rough walking distances and meal-break slots.

name: PackingListBuilder
description: Build a packing list for a chosen trip length, climate, and activity mix, with categories for clothing, toiletries, electronics, and documents.

name: VisaRequirementLookup
description: Return the visa or entry-permit requirements for a passport-issuing country traveling to a destination country, with maximum stay and typical processing time.

name: LayoverActivitySuggester
description: Suggest activities for a layover of a chosen length at a named airport, with airside and landside options.

name: HotelNeighborhoodBriefer
description: Return a brief on a named neighborhood in a destination city, with safety notes for evening, walkability score, and three landmark anchors.

name: SleepSessionLogger
description: Log a completed sleep session with bedtime, wake time, and a one-line restfulness note.

name: SleepDebtCalculator
description: Calculate accumulated sleep debt against a chosen nightly target across the past seven days.

name: ChronotypeQuiz
description: Administer a brief chronotype quiz and return a category from a published chronotype taxonomy such as morning lark or evening owl.

name: NappingWindowAdvisor
description: Suggest the optimal afternoon nap window for a person based on their typical wake time and intended nap length, with caveats for evening sleep onset.

name: BedtimeRoutineBuilder
description: Build a personalized bedtime wind-down routine of three to seven steps based on a chosen target sleep time, current evening obligations, and stated stimulants such as caffeine or screens to wind down from.

name: SleepEnvironmentAuditor
description: Audit a bedroom for sleep-friendliness across light, sound, temperature, and screen presence and return targeted improvements with rough cost.

name: ShoppingListAddItem
description: Add an item to the active shopping list with optional quantity and aisle hint.

name: ShoppingListCategorize
description: Reorder the active shopping list so items are grouped by store section such as produce, dairy, or pantry, given a chosen store layout.

name: ShoppingListBudgetEstimator
description: Estimate the total cost of an active shopping list using recent typical prices at a chosen store and currency.

name: WeeklyMealStaplesAutofill
description: Autofill the upcoming week's shopping list with household-defined staples such as milk, eggs, and bread, skipping items already on the list.

name: SubstituteWhenOutOfStock
description: Suggest a substitute item for a shopping-list entry that a chosen store reports as out of stock, ranked by closeness and price parity.

name: HabitDailyCheckOff
description: Mark a habit as completed for the current day and update its running streak.

name: HabitStreakSummary
description: Return current and longest streaks for every active habit in a chosen tracker.

name: NewHabitDesigner
description: Help design a new habit using a stated trigger, behavior, and reward pattern, with a recommended starter cadence and a backslide recovery rule.

name: HabitChainVisualizer
description: Return a visual representation of habit completions across a chosen number of past days as a calendar grid with per-day status.

name: HabitConflictDetector
description: Detect when two active habits typically schedule at overlapping times of day and suggest a deconfliction option.

name: BirthdayReminderRegister
description: Register a person's birthday for annual reminders, with optional relationship tag and preferred lead-time in days.

name: UpcomingOccasionsList
description: Return a chronological list of upcoming birthdays and anniversaries across a chosen window in days.

name: GiftIdeaBrainstormer
description: Brainstorm five gift ideas for a recipient given their stated interests, the occasion, and a budget range in a chosen currency.

name: CardMessageDrafter
description: Draft three card-message options for a chosen occasion and relationship, tunable along a warmth and humor axis.

name: AnniversaryMilestoneNamer
description: Return the traditional and modern gift theme for a chosen wedding anniversary number such as 'paper' for the first year.

name: CoinFlipper
description: Flip a fair virtual coin and return heads or tails.

name: DungeonMastersDiceMacro
description: Roll a complex dice-macro expression in the standard tabletop notation and return per-die rolls, modifiers, and the final total, with support for advantage, disadvantage, and exploding dice.

name: CustomQuoteFromAuthor
description: Return a quotation attributed to a named author across a chosen subject area, falling back to a 'no verified quotation' result rather than fabricating.

name: WordOfTheDayCard
description: Return a single word of the day with definition, etymology, and an example sentence, drawn from a chosen vocabulary band.

name: RoastBatchGenerator
description: Generate three gentle, affectionate roast lines for a friend based on a chosen quirk, with strict guardrails against punching down on protected categories or sensitive personal subjects.

name: QuizDeckBuilder
description: Build a multiple-choice quiz deck of a chosen length on a chosen topic, with a chosen difficulty curve from warm-up to challenge.

name: FlashcardSpacedRepetitionScheduler
description: Schedule the next review date for a flashcard based on the learner's most recent self-rating, using a standard spaced-repetition algorithm.

name: KnowledgeRetentionEstimator
description: Estimate the probability that a learner still remembers a flashcard given the time since last review and a chosen forgetting curve model.

name: QuizScoreSummary
description: Summarize a finished quiz session with score, per-category accuracy, time spent per question, and a one-line takeaway phrased encouragingly.

name: ChineseZodiacLookup
description: Return the Chinese zodiac animal and element for a chosen birth year.

name: CoffeeBrewRatioAdvisor
description: Return a recommended coffee-to-water ratio in grams for a chosen brew method and target strength.

name: TeaBrewingTimer
description: Start a steep timer tuned to a chosen tea type and leaf grade.

name: DayOfWeekResolver
description: Return the day of the week for a given calendar date.

name: CalorieBurnEstimator
description: Estimate calories burned during a chosen exercise type and intensity at a given body weight and duration.

name: MoviePickerByMood
description: Pick three movies matching a chosen mood, runtime cap, and decade window.

name: TripCarbonFootprintEstimator
description: Estimate the carbon footprint of a planned trip across flight, train, car, and accommodation segments, with per-segment breakdown, comparison to a chosen baseline year, and a recommendation on the highest-leverage offset to consider.

name: WeeklyExerciseProgramBuilder
description: Build a one-week exercise program across a chosen number of training days, mixing aerobic, strength, mobility, and rest sessions, calibrated to a chosen fitness level and any equipment available at home.

name: DinnerPartyMenuComposer
description: Compose a dinner party menu across appetizer, main, side, and dessert courses for a chosen guest count, dietary restrictions, target cuisine, and seasonal produce window, with a make-ahead timeline.

name: RoadTripRouteBriefer
description: Brief a multi-stop road trip with overnight stops, scenic detours, and EV-charging notes if needed, given a chosen origin, destination, total days, and a preferred daily driving cap in hours.

name: HomeMaintenanceSeasonalChecklist
description: Generate a seasonal home-maintenance checklist of ten to twenty tasks tuned to a chosen home type, climate, and ownership length, with rough time and cost estimates.

name: ElectricVehicleChargerFinder
description: Find compatible electric vehicle chargers within a chosen distance of a coordinate, with connector type and current availability.

name: CampsiteAvailabilityLookup
description: Return the availability of named campsites within a chosen park on a target date range.

name: MeditationSessionLogger
description: Log a completed meditation session with duration, technique, and a one-line reflection.

name: GratitudeListAdder
description: Add a one-line gratitude entry to the day's list.

name: BedtimeStoryReader
description: Read a short bedtime story tuned to a chosen age band and theme.

name: FocusPlaylistBuilder
description: Build a focus playlist of a chosen length tuned to a chosen energy level and any lyrical preference.

name: RecipeOfTheWeekFeed
description: Return a recipe of the week tuned to seasonal produce at a chosen locality.

name: KitchenInventoryTracker
description: Track the current pantry inventory with quantity, unit, and expiration date per item, with reminders for items approaching expiry.

name: HoroscopeDailyCard
description: Return a one-paragraph daily horoscope for a chosen western zodiac sign.

name: FengShuiRoomAdvisor
description: Return high-level feng shui suggestions for a chosen room layout described by orientation and primary furniture placement.

name: UnixTimestampNow
description: Return the current unix timestamp.

name: UnixToIsoConverter
description: Convert a unix timestamp to an ISO 8601 string.

name: IsoToUnixConverter
description: Convert an ISO 8601 string to a unix timestamp.

name: WeekNumberOfYear
description: Return the ISO week number for a date.

name: DaysBetweenDates
description: Return the days between two dates.

name: MonthsBetweenDates
description: Return the whole months between two dates.

name: PrimeFactorizer
description: Factor an integer into primes.

name: GreatestCommonDivisor
description: Compute the greatest common divisor.

name: LeastCommonMultiple
description: Compute the least common multiple.

name: FibonacciNumber
description: Return the nth Fibonacci number.

name: RomanNumeralConverter
description: Convert an integer to its Roman numeral form.

name: NumberToWordsConverter
description: Spell an integer out in English words.

name: PercentageCalculator
description: Compute one number as a percentage of another.

name: TipCalculator
description: Compute a tip amount.

name: BillSplitter
description: Split a bill across diners.

name: PaceFromTime
description: Compute running pace per kilometer.

name: BodyMassRatio
description: Compute body mass ratio from weight and height.

name: ShoeSizeConverter
description: Convert a shoe size between regions.

name: RingSizeConverter
description: Convert a ring size between regions.

name: HatSizeConverter
description: Convert a hat size between regions.

name: DressSizeConverter
description: Convert a dress size between regions.

name: PantSizeConverter
description: Convert a pant size between regions.

name: BraSizeConverter
description: Convert a bra size between regions.

name: PaperSizeLookup
description: Look up the dimensions of a paper size.

name: EnvelopeSizeLookup
description: Look up the dimensions of an envelope size.

name: CountryCallingNumber
description: Return the international calling prefix for a country.

name: CurrencyOfCountry
description: Return the currency for a country.

name: CapitalOfCountry
description: Return the capital of a country.

name: LanguageOfCountry
description: Return the primary language of a country.

name: FlagEmojiOfCountry
description: Return the flag emoji for a country.

name: PhoneticAlphabetSpeller
description: Spell a word with the NATO phonetic alphabet.

name: MorseEncoder
description: Encode a phrase in Morse signals.

name: MorseDecoder
description: Decode a Morse signal string.

name: Base64Stringify
description: Encode a short string as base64.

name: UpperCaseRender
description: Uppercase a string.

name: TitleCaseRender
description: Title-case a string.

name: SlugifyRender
description: Make a slug from a string.

name: ReverseStringRender
description: Reverse a short string.

name: PalindromeChecker
description: Check if a string is a palindrome.

name: WordCountForText
description: Count words in a short passage.

name: CharCountForText
description: Count characters in a short passage.

name: RandomColorHex
description: Return a random valid hex color.

name: RandomCardDraw
description: Draw one card from a standard deck.

name: RandomEmojiPicker
description: Return one random emoji from a category.

name: RandomNameGenerator
description: Return one random name from a culture pool.

name: RandomPasswordPhrase
description: Return a random four-word passphrase.

name: LuckyNumberPicker
description: Return a lucky number for a person.

name: DailyAffirmationShort
description: Return one short affirmation phrase.

name: MotivationalNudge
description: Return a short motivational nudge.

name: ComplimentGenerator
description: Return one short compliment.

name: ApologyDrafterShort

name: ThankYouNoteShort
